name: Conduct SEB Server Administrative Audit Report
description:
Perform a system-wide audit of the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080) using credentials super-admin / admin. Count and document the key system entities including Institutions, User Accounts (with roles), LMS Setups, SEB Exam Configurations (with statuses), and Exams. Save the structured audit report to /home/ga/seb_audit_report.txt using the following exact formatting:

SEB SERVER AUDIT REPORT
=======================

INSTITUTIONS
Count: <number>
- <institution_name_1>
- <institution_name_2>

USER ACCOUNTS
Count: <number>
- <username_1> | Role: <role_1>
- <username_2> | Role: <role_2>

LMS SETUPS
Count: <number>
- <lms_name_1>

SEB EXAM CONFIGURATIONS
Count: <number>
- <config_name_1> | Status: <status_1>
- <config_name_2> | Status: <status_2>

EXAMS
Count: <number>
- <exam_name_1>
